title: Houses of Hermes
note: The twelve canonical Houses (Core Rules Ch.2). Roll for a magus NPC's House, a rival covenant's character, or which House an Order matter springs from. Weighting leans slightly toward the larger/commoner Houses.

entries.value: Bonisagus — masters of Magic Theory and Hermetic research; Trianomae politicians who hold the Order together.
Bjornaer — beast-souled magi, each with a personal heartbeast animal form; insular, primal.
Criamon — body-marked mystics pursuing 'the Enigma'; cryptic, apolitical, alien logic.
Ex Miscellanea — vast, disorganized House of hedge traditions; accepts almost any Gifted wizard.
Flambeau — combat magi of fire and destruction; the Order's warriors, with an honour strand.
Guernicus (Quaesitor) — the Order's lawgivers; investigate and judge crimes against the Code.
Jerbiton — magi of art, civilization, and the mundane world; brokers with nobility and Church.
Mercere — the messengers; Gifted and unGifted Redcaps who carry news and bind the Order.
Merinita — faerie-bound magi who study and defend the fae; seek answers in Arcadia; strange.
Tremere — disciplined strategists who prize hierarchy and planning; invented Certamen.
Tytalus — masters of every kind of conflict; thrive on struggle; challenge their elders.
Verditius — unmatched crafters of enchanted items; proud, vendetta-prone; bound to casting tools.
